x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Schedule Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: The timeline for repayment, e.g., monthly, quarterly, or a one-time lump sum.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Amount Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: The principal and interest amounts to be paid in each installment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Rate and Charge Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: The cost of borrowing and any additional fees

x-enumeration-literals.name: Prepayment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Whether early repayment is allowed and if any penalties apply

x-enumeration-literals.name: Default and Late Payment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Consequences for missing payments, such as penalties, increased interest, or legal action.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mode of Repayment Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Accepted payment methods, e.g., bank transfer, direct debit, or cash.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Repayment eligibility refers to the criteria and conditions a borrower must meet to be allowed to make repayments on a loan or credit facility.
